thesis: A genuine conglomerate (cement, chemicals, paints, financial services) with constructive revisions; the natural core of a Conglomerate-themed book.
falsification: Revisions roll over or the cement/paints capex cycle disappoints, and GRASIM underperforms NIFTY 500 over the next 1-3 months.

thesis: Aluminium/Novelis franchise riding the metals cycle with revisions holding up better than ferrous peers.
falsification: Aluminium spreads compress and analyst revisions turn negative, with the stock lagging the metals sub-index.

thesis: Capacity-expansion story in steel; structural volume growth but revisions only middling now.
falsification: Steel spreads weaken and revisions fall further, dragging the name below the ferrous peer set.

thesis: Large-cap steel leverage to the cycle, but with neutral revisions it is now more beta than alpha.
falsification: Europe/India steel demand surprises up and revisions re-accelerate while I am underweight.

thesis: Best-in-class steel operator, but softening revisions argue for a smaller cyclical bet here.
falsification: Steel prices firm and JSW revisions turn back up, and it outperforms while I am underweight.

thesis: Power-equipment and electronics manufacturing tailwind; one of my better structural compounders.
falsification: Order inflow slows, revisions fade, and the stock derates from its premium multiple.

thesis: Forging franchise levered to autos plus a growing defense/aerospace order book; revisions still constructive.
falsification: Export/auto demand weakens and defense order timing slips, turning revisions negative.

thesis: Diversified retail lender with durable AUM growth and constructive analyst revisions.
falsification: Asset-quality stress or NIM compression shows up and revisions turn down.

thesis: SUV cycle leadership plus tractors and a financial-services/EV optionality stack — a true conglomerate holding.
falsification: SUV share slips or rural demand stalls and revisions deteriorate while the stock lags.

thesis: Diversified cash engine with retail/Jio re-rating optionality; a thematically central name I was carrying too light.
falsification: Telecom tariff or retail-margin disappointment, with revisions soft and the stock lagging the index.

thesis: Margin-recovery story in IT services where the revision trend is improving off a low base.
falsification: Deal momentum stalls, margin recovery disappoints, and revisions roll back over.

thesis: Bellwether IT quality, but flat revisions make it more of a ballast holding than an alpha bet now.
falsification: Discretionary IT spend re-accelerates and TCS revisions turn up sharply while I am underweight.

thesis: High-growth IT services name where revisions are among the strongest in the IT space — a clean ARM tilt.
falsification: A large-client ramp-down or guidance cut turns revisions negative within the quarter.

thesis: Best-in-class consumer-finance compounder; durable franchise even with revisions cooling.
falsification: Growth decelerates or credit costs rise and revisions turn clearly negative.

thesis: Best retail compounder of the cycle, but rich valuation plus neutral revisions warrant a smaller bet.
falsification: Same-store-sales momentum and revisions re-accelerate while I am underweight.

thesis: Conglomerate incubator (airports, new energy, infra) — keep a toe-hold but downsize as revisions soften.
falsification: A successful value-unlock or new-energy milestone re-accelerates revisions while I am underweight.

thesis: Demerger value-unlock plus diversified commodity exposure; keep VEDL as the single Vedanta expression.
falsification: Commodity prices and the demerger re-rating disappoint and revisions turn down.

thesis: Line-pipe order cycle with a constructive book; keep as a mid-weight industrials cyclical.
falsification: Order inflow slows and revisions fade, with the stock lagging the capital-goods cohort.

thesis: Textiles/apparel with an improving revision trend; baseline-supported.
falsification: Export demand and margins weaken and revisions turn negative.

thesis: Rural-lending franchise, but with revisions only neutral I size it smaller.
falsification: Rural credit demand and asset quality improve and revisions re-accelerate.

thesis: Digital-operations growth with a still-constructive revision trend.
falsification: Client concentration or margin pressure turns revisions negative.

thesis: Engineering/mobility platform with new-business optionality; keep a small position as revisions soften.
falsification: New-business ramp and revisions re-accelerate while I am underweight.

thesis: Upstream energy with rising revisions and a value cushion — a clean revision-led cyclical entry.
falsification: Crude weakens or windfall-tax/subsidy noise returns and revisions roll over.

thesis: Iron-ore producer with rising revisions and cheap valuation; revision-led commodity tilt.
falsification: Iron-ore prices fall and revisions turn down within the quarter.

thesis: Dominant life insurer re-rating on improving margins/VNB with rising revisions and low valuation.
falsification: VNB margin or persistency disappoints and revisions stall, with no re-rating.

thesis: Gold-loan franchise benefiting from high gold prices with rising revisions.
falsification: Gold prices fall or regulatory loan-to-value tightening hits, turning revisions negative.

thesis: CGD volume growth with margin recovery and rising revisions.
falsification: Spot-LNG/gas costs spike and squeeze margins, turning revisions down.

thesis: Explosives leader with a fast-growing defense order book and rising revisions.
falsification: Defense-order timing slips and revisions cool from elevated levels.

thesis: Dominant paints franchise where revisions are turning up after market-share scares.
falsification: Competitive intensity (new entrants) re-accelerates and revisions roll back over.

thesis: Specialty-chemical operator where the revision trend is inflecting up as the cycle bottoms.
falsification: Chemical pricing stays weak and revisions fail to follow through.

thesis: Injectables/CDMO franchise with rising revisions and a clean balance sheet.
falsification: US injectable pricing/regulatory issues turn revisions negative.

thesis: Refiner riding firm GRMs with rising revisions and deep value — a revision+value double tilt.
falsification: Refining margins compress and revisions reverse.

thesis: Engineering-consultancy order pipeline (energy/infra) with rising revisions and net cash.
falsification: Order inflow stalls and revisions fade.

thesis: Integrated, low-cost aluminium producer with improving revisions and a value cushion.
falsification: Aluminium/alumina prices fall and revisions turn negative.

thesis: High-margin zinc/silver producer with improving revisions and strong free cash flow.
falsification: Zinc/silver prices weaken and revisions reverse.

thesis: Grid and energy-equipment supplier with a strong order book and rising revisions.
falsification: Capex order timing slips and revisions cool from a high base.

thesis: Tanker/dry-bulk operator with firm freight rates, rising revisions and cheap valuation.
falsification: Freight rates fall and revisions turn down.
